projects.name: Joplin Server Vector Memory
projects.description: The Joplin Server Vector Memory MCP empowers your AI assistant with secure, semantic access to your personal knowledge base by acting as a direct, private bridge to your End-to-End Encrypted Joplin Server. By syncing, decrypting, and vectorizing your notes locally into a lightweight SQLite database, it creates a private, bi-directional memory system that allows your agent to seamlessly search, read, and write memories without compromising data privacy or relying on heavy external infrastructure.
